reasons.0: 报价p=0.5996需覆盖v×边际泄露。ρ=0.3中等相关性、σ²=0.1中等噪声下，他人分享已造成基础泄露；次模性使我的边际泄露较低。v=0.9居中，p略高于典型临界值（约0.55），且不分享仅避免少量额外 leakage，故分享期望效用更高。
reasons.1: 报价p=0.6101 exceeds estimated marginal privacy cost: with ρ=0.30 and σ²=0.1, marginal leakage is moderate; v=0.916 implies breakeven threshold ≈0.55–0.58, and p > threshold. Also, submodularity implies others' sharing reduces my marginal cost, making sharing more attractive given expected participation.
reasons.2: 报价p=0.6207覆盖了边际隐私成本：ρ=0.30和σ²=0.1下，他人分享已造成基础泄露，次模性使我的边际泄露较低；v=0.932中等偏高，但p略高于v×边际泄露的合理估计，且不分享无法避免基础泄露，故分享可获净效用。
reasons.3: 报价p=0.6312需覆盖v×边际泄露。ρ=0.30和σ²=0.1表明中等推断能力与噪声，他人分享已 induces non-zero baseline leakage。次模性意味着我的 marginal leakage is reduced if others share; with n=20 and v=0.947 near upper bound, p likely exceeds marginal cost. Thus, sharing yields net expected utility gain.
reasons.4: 报价p=0.6417覆盖边际隐私成本：ρ=0.3和σ²=0.1下，他人分享已 induces substantial baseline leakage；次模性使我的 marginal leakage low；v=0.963虽高，但p > v × marginal leakage given moderate correlation and noise. Sharing yields net positive utility.
